  "findings": [
    "Insufficient anchor bolt projection above the nut",
    "Non-compliance with API RP 686 minimum thread engagement requirements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt further baseplate installation and grouting activities",
    "Issue a non-conformance report (NCR)",
    "Consult engineering for an approved remediation plan (e.g., coupling nuts, bolt replacement, or lowering the foundation)"
  ],
  "rationale": "API RP 686 requires a minimum anchor bolt projection (typically at least 1.5 threads or a minimum length past the outer face of the nut). Insufficient projection prevents proper thread engagement and tensioning, which compromises the structural integrity of the equipment mounting. This must be corrected before grouting or equipment alignment can proceed.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 686 Chapter 4"
  ]
}
